intentSynonyms: show me my pages in confluence
see all my pages in confluence
list pages in a space in confluence
description: List Confluence pages. Optionally filter by space ID and sort by modified date. Returns paginated results.

space_id.description: Filter pages by space ID — omit to list pages across all spaces

limit.description: Maximum number of pages to return (default 25, max 250)

sort.description: Sort order (e.g., "-modified-date" for most recent first, "title" for alphabetical)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
